title: agathosma umbellata
intro: Agathosma umbellata, also known as the "Round Leaved Boekenhout," is a small, shrub-like plant native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. It is a member of the Rutaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to ease congestion and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Agathosma umbellata is typically used in teas, infusions, and essential oil form to leverage its medicinal benefits, including promoting relaxation and improving overall well-being.
